name: music-catalog-core
description: Deployable monorepo for Music Catalog API + Soundloom web

scripts.dev: sh -c "npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @mrq/api && npm run lint --workspace @mrq/web && npm run lint --workspace @mrq/shared
